EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for Powered Now Hot Lead.
EmailTemplate.name: Powered Now Kingsbridge USPs Email_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Why choose Kingsbridge?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’m still struggling to reach you since you were referred to us by Powered Now.
It’s likely you are looking at lots of different providers for your business insurance policy. So, here are the reasons why the team at Kingsbridge stand out from our competitors:
- Real people, real support: quick access to dedicated UK-based insurance specialists. - UK-based claims centre: rapid, responsive claims processing managed by an in-house claims team. - There when you need them: strong history of fair, fast, and hassle-free claims processing. - Tailored industry expertise: cover specifically built for contractors, freelancers, and small business owners. - No hidden fees: transparent pricing with no unexpected costs.
Let’s catch up on the phone so I can make sure I provide you with the best policy for you at the best price. Book a call with me - https://calendly.com/d/cnbd-zyn-qwh/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-powered-now
As a client of Powered Now, you are entitled to a discount of 10% on our standard business insurance package.
Alternatively, contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you soon!
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
